findings.summary: Tozorakimab met the primary endpoint in the Phase III MIRANDA trial, showing a statistically significant and clinically meaningful reduction in moderate-to-severe COPD exacerbations in former smokers and the overall population.
UCB acquired Neurona Therapeutics for up to $1.15 billion to enhance its epilepsy pipeline and cellular therapy capabilities.
Monte Rosa Therapeutics (GLUE) presented preclinical data at AACR 2026 demonstrating the potential of its CCNE1-directed molecular glue degrader to treat CCNE1-amplified solid tumors.
Alumis (ALMS) presented late-breaker oral Phase 3 data for envudeucitinib in moderate-to-severe plaque psoriasis at the 2026 AAD Annual Meeting.
Nuance Pharma published Phase 3 ENHANCE-China data in the CHEST journal, showing Ohtuvayre (ensifentrine) significantly improved lung function in Chinese adult patients with COPD.

AnaptysBio (ANAB) announced the spin-off distribution date for First Tracks Biotherapeutics, which occurred on April 20, 2026. Stockholders received one share of First Tracks for every share of ANAB owned.
Insmed (INSM) reported that its Phase 2b CEDAR trial of brensocatib in moderate to severe hidradenitis suppurativa failed to meet its primary and secondary efficacy endpoints.

Cabaletta Bio (CABA) filed an 8-K featuring an updated corporate presentation with Rese-cel (CABA-201) data across autoimmune diseases, including clinical responses in systemic sclerosis (SSc) and myositis.
A study published on Medscape indicates that the use of low-dose aspirin initiated at the diagnosis of Giant Cell Arteritis (GCA) may significantly reduce cardiovascular risk in these patients.
Passage Bio updated interim data from its ongoing Phase 1/2 upliFT-D clinical trial in an 8-K filing on April 20, 2026.
Larvol presented new data on Baff (B-cell activating factor) and B-cell biology at the IMMUNOLOGY2026 conference, highlighting therapeutic implications in autoimmune diseases.

Insmed reported that its Phase 2b CEDAR trial of brensocatib in moderate to severe hidradenitis suppurativa did not meet primary or secondary efficacy endpoints. As a result, the company plans to discontinue development of the drug for this indication.

Monte Rosa Therapeutics presented preclinical data at the AACR Annual Meeting 2026 highlighting its Cyclin E1 (CCNE1)-directed molecular glue degrader. The data demonstrate the potential of the degrader to treat CCNE1-amplified solid tumors.

AnaptysBio announced that its Board of Directors approved the spin-off of First Tracks Biotherapeutics. Stockholders of record as of April 20, 2026, will receive shares in the new entity, which is focused on the development of novel therapies.

Quantum-Si announced the presentation of two customer posters at the AACR Annual Meeting 2026. One poster (2421) by Nigel O'Neil, PhD, demonstrated the application of the company's single-molecule protein sequencing platform in cancer research.

The Phase III MIRANDA trial of tozorakimab met its primary endpoint in patients with COPD. Tozorakimab, an anti-IL-33 monoclonal antibody, showed significant reduction in COPD exacerbations by addressing underlying drivers of the disease.

Late-breaking 54-week data for povorcitinib in Hidradenitis Suppurativa were recapped at AAD 2026, showing sustained efficacy and a favorable safety profile in patients with moderate to severe disease.

A scoping review titled 'Aryl Hydrocarbon Receptor Signalling in Hidradenitis Suppurativa' was published online, exploring the role of AHR signaling in the pathogenesis of HS and its potential as a therapeutic target.
A study reported on Medscape suggests that using low-dose aspirin at the time of diagnosis of Giant Cell Arteritis (GCA) may significantly reduce the risk of cardiovascular events in these patients.
New research highlighted by Larvol Delta shows that reduced BCMA signaling disrupts the BAFF/APRIL axis, leading to increased inflammatory cytokine production by B cells in Multiple Sclerosis.
Alumis (ALMS) was highlighted at AAD 2026 for its progress in developing treatments for inflammatory skin diseases, joining major players like Sanofi and Incyte in the advancing dermatology space.

Clinical research highlighted on HCPLive suggests that fibrinogen may serve as a potential new marker for polymyalgia rheumatica (PMR), being useful in both diagnosis and monitoring treatment response.

A real-world study published in Dermatology Times quantified the elevated risk of autoimmune conditions, such as systemic sclerosis, in patients with vitiligo, emphasizing the need for comprehensive screening.
Research into the fecal metabolome in patients with early systemic sclerosis was highlighted, pointing towards potential gut microbiome-related biomarkers for the disease.

Long-term data (up to 4 years) from the SUNSHINE and SUNRISE trials for secukinumab (Cosentyx), an IL-17A inhibitor, were presented, demonstrating sustained efficacy and safety in patients with moderate to severe hidradenitis suppurativa.

A study presented at AAD 2026 showed that the combination of tirzepatide and ixekizumab (an IL-17A inhibitor) significantly improved clinical outcomes in patients suffering from both psoriatic arthritis and obesity.

AstraZeneca announced that tozorakimab, an IL-33 inhibitor, met the primary endpoint in the Phase III MIRANDA trial, significantly reducing the annualized rate of moderate or severe COPD exacerbations in patients with symptomatic COPD.
UCB announced the acquisition of Neurona Therapeutics for up to $1.15 billion to expand its epilepsy expertise and pipeline with cell therapies for drug-resistant focal epilepsy.

AnaptysBio, Inc. announced that its Board of Directors has approved the spin-off of First Tracks Biotherapeutics (TRAX), with the distribution of shares and commencement of trading expected on April 20, 2026.

Cabaletta Bio filed an 8-K reporting the presentation of new clinical data for CABA-201 at the AAN 2026 Annual Meeting. The data highlights the expansion of the rese-cel program across multiple autoimmune diseases, including systemic sclerosis and lupus.

Monte Rosa Therapeutics presented preclinical data at the AACR 2026 Annual Meeting demonstrating the potential of its Cyclin E1 (CCNE1)-directed molecular glue degrader to treat CCNE1-amplified solid tumors.

Nuance Pharma announced the publication of Phase 3 ENHANCE-China data for Ohtuvayre (ensifentrine) in the CHEST Journal, confirming its efficacy and safety in Chinese patients with moderate-to-severe COPD.
Insmed (INSM) reportedly faced a setback as brensocatib failed to meet its primary endpoints in a study for Hidradenitis Suppurativa, leading to a valuation review.
MoonLake Immunotherapeutics (MLTX) stock surged 30% following positive FDA updates regarding sonelokimab (an IL-17 inhibitor) for the treatment of Hidradenitis Suppurativa.
InflaRx announced it is reducing its workforce by approximately 30% to conserve capital and focus on its primary clinical development programs.
A study published in Medscape suggests that the use of low-dose aspirin at the time of diagnosis of Giant Cell Arteritis (GCA) may significantly reduce cardiovascular risk in these patients.
Kymera Therapeutics announced that KT-253, a novel MDM2 degrader, received FDA Orphan Drug Designation for the treatment of Acute Myeloid Leukemia (AML).
Experts discussed the interim results and design of the REPLENISH trial for Polymyalgia Rheumatica, focusing on new era steroid-sparing options.
A report on April 20, 2026, discusses how targeting BAFF-R with ianalumab in combination with BTK inhibition shows promise in treating Chronic Lymphocytic Leukemia (CLL).
Nuance Pharma announced the publication of Phase 3 ENHANCE clinical data for Ensifentrine for the maintenance treatment of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) in the journal CHEST.
Vor Bio has reportedly folded (ceased operations) as of April 2026, joining a list of other biotech companies that have closed due to policy uncertainty and market conditions.
The FDA has granted RMAT designation to Galapagos' novel CAR T-cell therapy, GLPG5101, which is being developed for the treatment of relapsed or refractory mantle cell lymphoma.
Sutro Biopharma presented promising preclinical data for its Integrin beta-6 targeting antibody-drug conjugate (ADC), STRO-006, at the AACR 2026 Annual Meeting.
An AAD 2026 Preview highlighted late-breaking data for hidradenitis suppurativa that is expected to support Incyte's pipeline candidate povortitinib.
Analysis of Insmed's valuation following a significant setback for brensocatib in a clinical study for the treatment of Hidradenitis Suppurativa.
Immunofoco presented preclinical data for IMV102, an in vivo BCMA-targeting CAR-T candidate, demonstrating durable tumor control at the AACR 2026 meeting.
Genprex collaborators presented positive preclinical data on the use of Reqorsa gene therapy for the treatment of lung cancer at the AACR 2026 Annual Meeting.
AstraZeneca's experimental drug tozorakimab significantly reduced flare-ups of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD) in late-stage clinical trials.
Alumis Inc. (ALMS) received a consensus 'Moderate Buy' recommendation from analysts as of April 20, 2026.
Analysis of Q32 Bio Inc. (QTTB) indicates a bullish moving average trend in its stock performance as of April 19, 2026.
Biogen entered into an agreement with TJ Biopharma for Felzartamab assets in Greater China, a drug with potential applications in systemic sclerosis.
Prelude Therapeutics (PRLD) issued an 8-K filing announcing the presentation of new preclinical data at the AACR 2026 Annual Meeting.
Research indicated that the use of low-dose aspirin at the time of diagnosis of Giant Cell Arteritis (GCA) may reduce cardiovascular risk.
The FDA granted priority review for Keytruda in several new indications, including the treatment of polymyalgia rheumatica.
